name: Warrior
description: A master of steel who can take a beating. Front-line fighter with high durability and consistent damage.

starting_abilities.name: Slayer
starting_abilities.description: If attacking an enemy you have already harmed, do ULTIMATE damage

starting_abilities.name: Defender
starting_abilities.description: Allies within CLOSE range of you may use your DEFENSE stat

starting_abilities.name: Pit Fighter
starting_abilities.description: When you take damage, add the amount of the last hit against you to the next hit you make

starting_loot.name: Weapon Gem
starting_loot.description: Customize any 1 WEAPON with a special counterweight. Give this WEAPON a +2 EFFORT bonus. The gem cannot be removed

starting_loot.name: Shield Glove
starting_loot.description: A strapped glove and belt harness for carrying shields. Shields occupy no space in your INVENTORY

starting_loot.name: Battle Standard
starting_loot.description: A tabard or banner with your inspiring war insignia. Choose 1 ally per ROUND, their next roll is EASY

milestone_abilities.name: Ever Stronger
milestone_abilities.description: Add 1 to any STAT

milestone_abilities.name: Power Strike
milestone_abilities.description: On an attack roll of modified 15+, do your maximum EFFORT

milestone_abilities.name: Intervention
milestone_abilities.description: Once per ROUND, intercept an attack against a CLOSE ally

milestone_abilities.name: Endurance
milestone_abilities.description: When RECOVERING, add 1D6 to the normal amount

milestone_abilities.name: Hurler
milestone_abilities.description: Use your STR to attack with any WEAPON as a thrown WEAPON

milestone_abilities.name: Revenge
milestone_abilities.description: Enemies you injure will only fight you until dead or defeated

milestone_abilities.name: Berserk
milestone_abilities.description: Spend 1D4 HP to add an additional attack on your turn

mastery_abilities.name: Slayer Mastery
mastery_abilities.description: Any time you destroy an enemy, hit another enemy within CLOSE range, with no limit on the chain reaction

mastery_abilities.name: Defender Mastery
mastery_abilities.description: Any time an enemy fails to hit you because of DEFENSE, gain 1D4 HP

mastery_abilities.name: Pit Fighter Mastery
mastery_abilities.description: With any type of WEAPON, roll STR to hit and add STR to your EFFORT roll

name: Hunter
description: A marksman with a knack for survival. Excels at ranged combat and tactical positioning.

starting_abilities.name: Quick Draw
starting_abilities.description: On a ranged attack roll of modified 15+, fire again

starting_abilities.name: Dead Eye
starting_abilities.description: Use one TURN to aim. Your next successful hit deals max damage

starting_abilities.name: Trap Expert
starting_abilities.description: Your traps damage all victims NEAR the trap when tripped

starting_loot.name: Crystal Scope

starting_loot.description: An enchanted steel sleeve imbues your ammunition with a spark of magic. Your shots inflict ENERGY damage

starting_loot.name: Trap Launcher
starting_loot.description: With this spring-loaded gadget, roll a ranged attack to place a trap anywhere you can see

milestone_abilities.name: Ever Stronger

mastery_abilities.name: Trap Expert Mastery
